_comment: Draft Kinyarwanda translations for each journey stop's name + pastoral note. Loaded by scripts/build-journeys.mjs and merged into the GeoJSON as name_rw / notes_rw. Marked as draft alongside the Acts 1–12 Bible text. Pastor Fidele may refine any string by editing this file — the build picks changes up automatically.
_format: Keys are journey ids from build-journeys.mjs. `stops` is a 0-indexed array matching the order in JOURNEYS[i].stops (so stops[0] is sequence=1).

stops.name: Umusozi w'Elayono
stops.notes: Yesu azamuka mu ijuru avuye kuri uyu musozi; intumwa zigaruka i Yerusalemu zitegereje Umwuka wasezeranyijwe.

stops.name: Cyumba cyo Hejuru
stops.notes: Abantu ijana na makumyabiri bahuje umutima; indimi z'umuriro ziragwa — Itorero rivukira mu isengesho no mu mbaraga.

stops.name: Ibiraro bya Salomo
stops.notes: Ahantu h'inyigisho ya buri munsi mu rusengero — buhamya bushize amanga 'bahuje umutima' aho Yesu yagendaga.

stops.name: Irembo Ryiza
stops.notes: Petero na Yohana bakiza umucumbamye; Izina rya Yesu rifungura ibyo ifeza itashoboye gufungura.

stops.name: Inteko Nkuru ya Sanedirini
stops.notes: Inshuro ebyiri imbere y'Inama: 'Ntidushobora kureka kuvuga ibyo twabonye n'ibyo twumvise.'

stops.name: Akeludama
stops.notes: Umurima waguzwe n'ifeza ya Yuda — urwibutso rukomeye rwerekana ko ubugambanyi bufite ahanyu, kandi Kristo akaba akomeza kubaka Itorero rye.

stops.name: Yerusalemu
stops.notes: Sawuli arangiza Itorero; abizera baratatana — kandi mu kugenda kwabo, babwiriza ijambo.

stops.name: Samariya
stops.notes: Filipo abwiriza Kristo; umujyi wakira ijambo ushishikaye; Petero na Yohana barambika ibiganza, Umwuka uragwa.

stops.name: Inzira ya Gaza
stops.notes: Marayika yohereje Filipo mu majyepfo; Umunyetiyopiya asoma Yesaya 53 — 'Nabishobora nte ntariho unsobanurira?'

stops.name: Azoto
stops.notes: Yajyanywe n'Umwuka — ahantu Filipo akomereza kubwiriza, ku ikibaya cya kera cy'Abafilisitiya.

stops.name: Kayisariya
stops.notes: Filipo atura aha aba umubwiriza-butumwa; nyuma y'imyaka, abakobwa be bane barahanura kandi Pawulo amwakira mu nzu ye.

stops.name: Yerusalemu
stops.notes: Yatsimbarayeho iterabwoba n'ubwicanyi; afite inzandiko zo gukurura abigishwa b'Inzira ababoshye.

stops.name: Damasiko
stops.notes: Umucyo uvuye mu ijuru; ijwi rivuye mu ijuru — 'Ni iki gitumye untoteza?' Uwatotezaga aragwa.

stops.name: Umuhanda Ugororotse
stops.notes: Iminsi itatu atabona; Ananiya aramurambikaho ibiganza — ibishishwa biragwa, Sawuli yuzura Umwuka, akabatizwa.

stops.name: Arabiya
stops.notes: Igihe cy'agacuho mu butayu; ubutumwa bumuhindura mbere yo kububwiriza.

stops.name: Damasiko (gusubira)
stops.notes: Inyigisho ishize amanga mu masinagogi: 'Ni Umwana w'Imana.' Bamumanura mu gihome mu gitebo arokoka umugambi.

stops.name: Yerusalemu (gusubira)
stops.notes: Abigishwa baramutinya; Barinaba aramwakira; ajya impaka ashize amanga n'Abayuda bavuga Ikigiriki kugeza na bo bigirira umugambi wo kumwica.

stops.name: Taruso
stops.notes: Yoherezwa iwabo arinzwe — imyaka yo guhishe, itegura ibyo Umwuka azakora i Antiyokiya.

stops.name: Yerusalemu
stops.notes: Petero akorera ku mutima w'Itorero ry'Abayahudi mbere y'uko urugi rufungukira amahanga.

stops.name: Lida
stops.notes: Ayineya, umaze imyaka umunani aryamye ku buriri, akirizwa mu Izina; abari batuye i Lida no muri Saroni bahindukirira Umwami.

stops.name: Yopa
stops.notes: Tabita azukira ku rugo rwa Simoni umukannyi w'impu; iyerekwa kuri terase: 'Icyo Imana yejeje, ntukacyite igihumanye.'

stops.name: Kayisariya
stops.notes: Urugo rwa Koruneliyo rwakira Umwuka mu gihe Petero akiri kubwiriza — Pentekote ku Banyamahanga.

stops.name: Yerusalemu (gusubira)
stops.notes: Petero arasobanura; Itorero rihimbaza Imana — 'no ku Banyamahanga Imana yahaye kwihana kubageza ku bugingo.'

stops.name: Yerusalemu
stops.notes: Itotezwa ritatanya; nyuma Herode yica Yakobo afatira na Petero — ariko Itorero risenga ridahagarara.

stops.name: Foyinike
stops.notes: Abizera bagenda bagera i Foyinike — bababwiriza, ariko mu ntangiriro ari Abayuda gusa.

stops.name: Kupuro
stops.notes: Mu batatanye, ubutumwa bunyura mu mato y'ubucuruzi.

stops.name: Antiyokiya
stops.notes: Abanya-Kupuro n'Abanya-Kurene bavugana n'Abagiriki; 'ukuboko k'Umwami kwari kumwe na bo' — Itorero ry'Abanyamahanga riravuka.

stops.name: Yerusalemu (yohereza Barinaba)
stops.notes: Itorero rya kibyeyi rirumva, ryohereza umugabo mwiza — 'wuzuye Umwuka Wera no kwizera.'

stops.name: Antiyokiya (Barinaba arahageze)
stops.notes: Abona ubuntu bw'Imana arishima; abasaba kugumana n'Umwami bafite umutima uhamye.

stops.name: Taruso
stops.notes: Barinaba ashakira Sawuli — Imana yari yarmamutegura mu myaka yo guhishe.

stops.name: Antiyokiya (umwaka wose)
stops.notes: Umwaka wose w'inyigisho hamwe; abigishwa batangirira kwitwa Abakristo — irizina rirabakwiranye.

stops.name: Kayisariya
stops.notes: Herode yemera ko imbaga imuvuga 'ijwi ry'imana' nuko ahanagurwa — umwami wanze guha Imana icyubahiro.

stops.name: Yerusalemu (Petero arekuwe)
stops.notes: Marayika amukura muri gereza; 'noneho menye ko Umwami yohereje marayika we' — Itorero risenga ritangarira ibyabaye.

stops.name: Antiyokiya (gusubirayo)
stops.notes: Barinaba na Sawuli bagaruka bavuye mu mfashanyo y'inzara, bazana Yohana Mariko — n'igitabo cy'ubumisiyoneri kiratangira.

stops.name: Antiyokiya (yo muri Siriya)
stops.notes: Yoherejwe n'Itorero risenga kandi rikiyiriza ubusa.

stops.name: Seleukiya
stops.notes: Ikambu yo kujya i Kupuro.

stops.name: Salamis
stops.notes: Inyigisho ya mbere mu masinagogi y'Abayuda i Kupuro.

stops.name: Pafo
stops.notes: Elima yacuwa amaso; umutware Sergiyo Pawulo aremera.

stops.name: Peruge
stops.notes: Yohana Mariko ataha asubira i Yerusalemu.

stops.name: Antiyokiya ya Pisidiya
stops.notes: Inyigisho mu isinagogi — Abanyamahanga bakira ijambo bishimye.

stops.name: Ikoniyo
stops.notes: Inyigisho ishize amanga; umugambi wo kubatera amabuye — barahunga.

stops.name: Lusitira
stops.notes: Umucumbamye akirizwa; ababakekera ko ari imana, hanyuma Pawulo aterwa amabuye.

stops.name: Derebe
stops.notes: Bigishwa benshi babaho — ahantu hakure cyane mu rugendo.

stops.name: Lusitira (kugaruka)
stops.notes: Bakomeza amatorero, bashyiraho abakuru.

stops.name: Ikoniyo (kugaruka)
stops.notes: Kimwe — gukomeza no gushyiraho abakuru.

stops.name: Antiyokiya ya Pisidiya (kugaruka)
stops.notes: Kimwe — gukomeza no gushyiraho abakuru.

stops.name: Peruge (kugaruka)
stops.notes: Babwiriza ijambo i Peruge.

stops.name: Atalia
stops.notes: Ikambu yo kugarukira.

stops.name: Antiyokiya (kugarukayo)
stops.notes: Inkuru bayitanga mu Itorero ryabohereje — urugi rw'ukwizera rufungukiye Abanyamahanga.

stops.name: Antiyokiya (yo muri Siriya)
stops.notes: Pawulo na Sila boherezwa; Barinaba ajyana Yohana Mariko i Kupuro.

stops.name: Derebe
stops.notes: Gukomeza amatorero.

stops.name: Lusitira
stops.notes: Timoteyo yifatanya nabo.

stops.name: Trowa
stops.notes: Iyerekwa ry'umugabo w'i Makedoniya — 'Ngwino udufashe.'

stops.name: Samutirakiya
stops.notes: Bararara mu nyanja.

stops.name: Neapoli
stops.notes: Intambwe ya mbere ku butaka bw'Uburayi.

stops.name: Filipi
stops.notes: Lidiya, umukobwa w'umucakara, umurinzi w'imbohe — Itorero rya mbere ry'Uburayi.

stops.name: Amfipoli
stops.notes: Banyuraho.

stops.name: Apoloniya
stops.notes: Banyuraho.

stops.name: Tesaloniki
stops.notes: Isabato eshatu z'inyigisho ishize amanga; imbaga n'ibirego.

stops.name: Beroya
stops.notes: 'Abanya-Beroya b'icyubahiro' — bashakisha mu Byanditswe buri munsi.

stops.name: Atene
stops.notes: Inyigisho yo ku Aleopago — Imana itazwi imenyekanishwa.

stops.name: Korinto
stops.notes: Amezi cumi n'umunani na Akwila na Pirisila; 1 na 2 Abatesalonike byanditswe aha.

stops.name: Kenkure
stops.notes: Ikambu iri iburasirazuba bwa Korinto — Pawulo yikemera umutwe.

stops.name: Efeso (mu gihe gito)
stops.notes: Inyigisho ngufi mu isinagogi — 'Nzagaruka.'

stops.name: Kayisariya
stops.notes: Asuhuza Itorero.

stops.name: Antiyokiya (kugarukayo)
stops.notes: Ku rugo nyuma y'urugendo rwa kabiri.

stops.name: Antiyokiya (yo muri Siriya)
stops.notes: Kuva ku Itorero ryatumye, ubwa gatatu.

stops.name: Galatiya na Frugiya
stops.notes: Gukomeza abigishwa bose umwe ku wundi.

stops.name: Efeso
stops.notes: Umurimo w'imyaka itatu; imvururu z'abacuzi b'ifeza; ijambo riragwira cyane.

stops.name: Makedoniya
stops.notes: Asubira i Filipi, Tesaloniki, Beroya.

stops.name: Ubugiriki (Korinto)
stops.notes: Amezi atatu — ahari ni bwo yandika urwandiko ku Baroma.

stops.name: Filipi (Pasika)
stops.notes: Bagenda mu mato nyuma y'Umunsi mukuru w'Imitsima Itasembuwe.

stops.name: Trowa
stops.notes: Eyutuko agwa mu idirishya — akazurwa.

stops.name: Aso
stops.notes: Pawulo ajya ku butaka imbere; arongera kwifatanya n'ubwato.

stops.name: Mitilene
stops.notes: Bararara kuri Lesibo.

stops.name: Kiyo
stops.notes: Banyura ku kirwa.

stops.name: Samo
stops.notes: Bagera ku kirwa.

stops.name: Mileto
stops.notes: Asezera mu maganya abakuru b'Itorero ry'i Efeso.

stops.name: Kose
stops.notes: Urugendo rw'umunsi rujya i Kose.

stops.name: Rodo
stops.notes: Bakomeza bajya i Rodo.

stops.name: Patara
stops.notes: Bahindura amato bajya mu rujyana i Foyinike.

stops.name: Tiro
stops.notes: Abigishwa baburira Pawulo binyujijwe ku Mwuka ngo atazamuka i Yerusalemu.

stops.name: Putolemayi
stops.notes: Umunsi umwe na bene Data.

stops.name: Kayisariya
stops.notes: Filipo umubwiriza-butumwa aramwakira; Agabo amubohera amaboko.

stops.name: Yerusalemu
stops.notes: Afatirwa mu rusengero — urugendo rurangirira mu minyururu.

stops.name: Kayisariya
stops.notes: Yinjira mu bwato ari ku butegetsi bwa Yuliyo umutware w'ijana.

stops.name: Sidoni
stops.notes: Yuliyo aremera mu buntu ko Pawulo asura inshuti.

stops.name: Mira
stops.notes: Bahindura ubwato bwa Alegizandere bw'ingano bujya muri Italiya.

stops.name: Kinido
stops.notes: Bagenda mu mato banyuranye n'umuyaga.

stops.name: Inkingi ya Salimone
stops.notes: Bazenguruka ku impera y'iburasirazuba bwa Kerete.

stops.name: Ibyambu Byiza
stops.notes: Iburira rya Pawulo ryanzwe — bakomeza ingendo mu mato.

stops.name: Bajyanwa n'umuyaga
stops.notes: Iminsi cumi n'ine mu nkubi; Pawulo abona marayika; ubugingo 276 burakizwa.

stops.name: Malita
stops.notes: Ubwato bwaracitse; inzoka; umukuru Puburiyusi akizwa; amezi atatu ku kirwa.

stops.name: Sirakusa
stops.notes: Iminsi itatu muri Sisiliya.

stops.name: Regiyo
stops.notes: Umuyaga mwiza w'amajyepfo urahaguruka.

stops.name: Puteoli
stops.notes: Bene Data muri Italiya — iminsi irindwi hamwe.

stops.name: Isoko rya Apiyo
stops.notes: Abizera b'i Roma baza ibirometero birenga 70 kumusanganira.

stops.name: Inzu Eshatu
stops.notes: 'Ababonye, Pawulo ashima Imana arongera kugira ubutwari.'

stops.name: Roma
stops.notes: Imyaka ibiri afungiwe mu nzu — abwiriza ubwami ashize amanga, nta nkomyi.
